description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and abstracted form, lacking any recognizable human features or anatomical structure. The surfaces are stretched and angular, with elongated, thin elements extending outward in various directions. There are no discernible limbs, head, or torso, and the form is dominated by sharp, reflective planes and wiry extensions. The material seems to be metallic or highly polished, giving off a glossy sheen with some reflective qualities. The overall shape is irregular and does not resemble a typical pedestrian adult, instead appearing more like a fragmented or glitched digital sculpture. There are no visible clothing items, accessories, or footwear, and the object does not display any typical human posture.
description: A highly abstract, angular, and reflective form with elongated, wiry extensions and no recognizable human features. The object is metallic and irregular, lacking any clear anatomical structure.
description_view_0: From this view, only thin, elongated lines and a small portion of a reflective surface are visible, with no human features apparent.
description_view_1: This angle shows a larger, flat, reflective plane with some angular distortion, and a few thin extensions, still lacking any human form.
description_view_2: A more complex view with intersecting reflective surfaces and wiry extensions, emphasizing the abstract and fragmented nature of the object.
description_view_3: This perspective highlights a broad, flat, reflective surface and more of the wiry extensions, with no discernible human anatomy.
